(b) to (e) which related to specially qualified agency report, biennial reports to Congress, academic achievement assessment, and determination regarding continuing participation, respectively.Pub. (3) which read as follows: “the degree to which progress has been made toward meeting the goals and objectives described in the application submitted under .”Pub. children.text: if the report is submitted by a State educational agency, the method the State educational agency used to award grants to eligible local educational agencies, and to provide assistance to schools, under this subpart;
how local educational agencies and schools used funds provided under this subpart; and

the degree to which progress has been made toward meeting the objectives and outcomes described in the application submitted under , including having all students in the State or the area served by the specially qualified agency, as applicable, meet the challenging State academic standards.section 7351b of this title
